rules.deityPlacement: left 40-45% width, EXTREME close-up face + ONE blessing hand ONLY, slightly facing toward text side. Crop TIGHT — face fills most of the left half. NO lower body, NO full figure, NO wide shots.
rules.textPlacement: right 55-60%, center-right vertical alignment, balanced margins, plenty of breathing room around text
rules.style: Cinematic Hyperreal Devotional — deity-faithful aura color palette (NOT always gold). 4 visual systems: (1) CINEMATIC LIGHTING: strong deity-colored rim light + glow bloom + high contrast shadows — Hollywood feel. (2) DIVINE ENERGY: concentric sacred ring halo in the deity's own aura color, deity-colored energy swirls, floating sparks in matching tones. (3) MATERIAL REALISM: reflective metal textures on ornaments, jewelry depth, shadow realism — premium feel. (4) EMOTIONAL FACE: EXTREME close-up, soft compassionate eyes with visible emotion, divine expression that creates instant emotional pull — the face must be DOMINANT on mobile. Ultra-realistic skin texture. Never cartoon, never illustration, never painting, never temple sculpture. Modern AI cinematic hybrid.
rules.aura: dramatic concentric sacred rings or halo behind deity in the DEITY'S OWN AURA COLOR (blue for Shiva, orange-red for Hanuman, violet for Durga, etc.). NOT always gold. Color must match the deity's auraColor field.
rules.lighting: strong rim light from behind deity in deity's aura color, warm accent glow, high contrast: bright deity vs dark background. Rim light color should MATCH the deity's aura, not default to gold.
rules.background: deep dark gradient (black to dark warm tone matching deity's aura color palette). Deity-colored energy effects: swirling fire/energy in matching hues, embers, sparks, light flares radiating from the aura area. Pure atmospheric void — no architecture, no scenery. Background effects add divine energy without cluttering the text area.
rules.atmosphere: deity-colored energy swirls throughout background, floating sparks and embers in matching tones around deity area, subtle mist/smoke at base, soft bokeh. Effects concentrated around deity — text area must be DARK and CLEAN (visual silence for text). ONE optional visual trigger element allowed (see visualTriggers).
rules.textRules: MAX 2-3 VIRAL words ONLY. Text must trigger CURIOSITY or URGENCY — not be descriptive or generic. Bold condensed font. STRONG dark drop shadow + slight glow on text edges for mobile readability. TWO-LINE HIERARCHY (critical): When hook is 2 words, split across 2 lines — LINE 1 (command word) = DOMINANT, 40-50% bigger than LINE 2, WHITE #FFFFFF. LINE 2 (emotion word) = smaller, COLORED using intent accent color (e.g. RED #FF3B3B for pain/healing, ORANGE #FF6600 for power, GOLD #FFD700 for abundance). This creates visual hierarchy = faster reading = stronger impact. Single-line only when phrase is extremely strong and short (e.g. 'HEAL NOW'). Problem-solution pattern: LINE 1 = command/action that grabs attention ('STOP', 'BREAK', 'RISE'), LINE 2 = emotional payload that hooks ('PAIN', 'FREE', 'NOW'). Brain reads in 2 steps = stronger impact.
rules.negativeSpace: right side text area must be ULTRA-DARK EMPTY SPACE (visual silence). No props, no particles behind text, no glow bleed, no light interference, no energy leak from deity side. Text sits in PURE DARKNESS with only its own drop shadow. Make it DARKER and CLEANER than seems necessary — the extreme contrast between bright deity (left) and pitch-dark text area (right) creates the click trigger. Any stray particles, light streaks, or glow bleeding into the text zone kills readability and CTR.
rules.visualTriggers: ONE subtle visual trigger element per thumbnail to create story: (A) energy/light emanating from deity's hand toward viewer, (B) glowing element in deity's chest/heart area, (C) light beam connecting deity to text, (D) subtle glow near third eye area (for deities with third eye like Shiva), (E) faint light pulse or energy ripple effect around deity's head. Only ONE — never combine. Must feel natural and subtle — just a HINT of energy, not overwhelming. The micro-hook adds life to an otherwise static composition without cluttering.
rules.characterFidelity: preserve canonical deity attributes exactly — NO mixing iconography. EXTREME close-up: face must fill at least 75-80% of the left zone height (zoom 10-15% tighter than default). Eyes MUST be large, bright, and clearly visible even at mobile thumbnail size — slightly increase eye brightness/luminosity for instant emotional connection. Expression should convey emotion that matches the intent (fierce for power, loving for love, serene for peace). Human-like skin texture, realistic lighting on skin, slight idealization. Face zoom is critical: tighter crop = more emotional pull = higher CTR.
rules.avoid: no clutter, no lower body, no full figure shots, no multiple props, no particles behind text, no glow behind text area, no light interference in text zone, no generic/calm/descriptive text (must be viral), no center composition, no same-looking variants, no always-gold (use deity colors), no same-weight text lines (must have hierarchy: line 1 dominant, line 2 smaller + colored), no both-lines-white (use color contrast between lines)

deities.name: Ganesha
deities.visualSignature: elephant head with natural proportions (not exaggerated or cartoonish), large compassionate intelligent eyes with subtle glow, trunk gently curved with natural elegant flow, large symmetrical realistic ears, calm benevolent divine expression (peace + power), one hand raised in blessing (Abhaya mudra), optional second hand holding modak OR lotus (only one if cluttered), large rounded belly (symbol of abundance), rich golden ornaments: crown necklaces armlets (intricate but not overwhelming), realistic skin texture (stone-like divine skin or soft radiant tone not plastic), NO mixing with other deities (no Shiva elements no trident no third eye)
deities.auraStyle: dramatic golden concentric sacred rings behind deity with warm amber-orange fire energy radiating outward, golden sparks and embers floating around halo area, swirling golden light flares, divine prosperity radiance with cinematic depth

textHierarchy.rule: 2-line split: LINE 1 = command word (BIG, WHITE, dominant). LINE 2 = emotion word (smaller, COLORED). Creates visual hierarchy for faster reading and stronger emotional impact.
textHierarchy.line1Style: WHITE #FFFFFF, 40-50% bigger than line 2, STRONG drop shadow, dominant position
textHierarchy.line2Style: colored accent, smaller than line 1, STRONG drop shadow, emotional payload
